subject.description: A real man in his 30s, dark clothing, leaning forward at the left edge of the frame, one hand raised mid-gesture as if presenting something. Slightly blurred — secondary to the graphic elements.
subject.action: Pointing toward the right side of the frame where bold graphic data elements float. Caught mid-explanation, not posed.

setting.location: Abstract dark background — deep charcoal (#111827). No real environment. Pure graphic space.
setting.time_of_day: Timeless — no natural light, fully graphic.

composition.framing: Full medium shot. Human figure left third of frame. Right two-thirds filled with bold graphic elements: two large blocks — one labeled with an arrow pointing DOWN (showing reduction), one with bold large number typography. Strong geometric shapes divide the space.

lighting.type: Graphic studio light — clean, flat, no shadows. Pure product/design lighting.
lighting.color_grading: Deep purple (#8b5cf6) and hot pink (#ec4899) color blocks on near-black background. High contrast. Bold.

mood: Confident clarity — the visual equivalent of someone who has figured something out and is showing you the proof.
aesthetic_style: Bold graphic design infographic. Strong geometric color blocks in deep purple (#8b5cf6) and pink (#ec4899) on dark near-black background (#111827). Large bold sans-serif typography as primary design element. Arrow shapes and data bars rendered as graphic shapes. One real human figure integrated at left — slightly blurred, caught mid-gesture. High contrast, modern SaaS design aesthetic. Not a photo. Not a cartoon. A designed graphic with a real person.
